But then I worry that if I miss a day or two, I’ll feel like I’ve failed again. It’s like I’m trying to build this structure for myself, but there’s always that nagging fear that I won’t stick to it. I just want to feel like I’m making progress without all this pressure weighing me down. It’s exhausting to think about all the ways I might fall short.
